landing.hero_subtitle: Ensure your bank account is Aadhaar DBT-seeded to receive government scholarship disbursements directly without delays.
landing.compare_title: Aadhaar Linked vs. DBT Seeded Accounts
landing.compare_subtitle: Understand why simple linking is not enough to receive scholarship funds.
landing.linked_card_desc: Your bank associates your Aadhaar number with your account for identity verification. It functions like a post office knowing your name but not having your specific home address.
landing.seeded_card_desc: Your account is mapped on the central NPCI (National Payments Corporation of India) database. This functions like your verified, registered delivery address so that DBT scholarship funds reach you directly.
landing.badge_sec_title: Row-level security. Hashed identity. Direct transfers.
landing.badge1_desc: Raw numbers are hashed with server-side pepper and are never stored or logged.
landing.badge2_desc: Every database query is strictly scoped to your authenticated student ID.
landing.badge3_desc: Scan qualifications against 25+ scholarship schemes from DoSJE instantly.

wizard.title: Student Profile Wizard
wizard.name: Full Name
wizard.not_sure_explainer: If you are 'Not Sure' of your NPCI seeding status, you must check mAadhaar app or visit your bank branch to complete the DBT consent form. You can proceed with the checklist below.

dashboard.title: Welcome back
dashboard.dbt_score_desc: A score of 100% means your account is ready for DBT scholarship transfers.
dashboard.checklist_desc: Mark these steps completed as you perform them to achieve 100% readiness:
